name: Memory Search Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy memory search tool that turns memory_entries recall results into an auditable context_package with memory refs, source refs, retrieval metadata, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query used to find structured Buddy memories.

inputSchema.name: Embedding Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Optional embedding model id/provider:model to enable hybrid memory recall.

inputSchema.name: Reranker Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Optional reranker provider:model used to reorder hybrid memory recall candidates.

inputSchema.name: Status
inputSchema.description: Memory status filter; defaults to active.

outputSchema.name: Memory Search Report
outputSchema.description: Search query, memory ids, source refs, retrieval ranking reports, budget, and warnings.
